title: Archer Golems
description: Adds a tameable golem that fires arrow to protect you.
body:
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19b87d3537fb245d205ca603fe247171ae852a7c.png)

**THIS MOD IS DEPRECATED, WILL BE UPGRADED WITH AN ANOTHER MOD**

This mod adds new small and cute golem to fight with you.

### Plank Golem:
- Inspired by Plank Golem from MC Legends,
- It can be crafted or obtained from villagers by trading for its summon item,
- Can be tamed using oak logs,
- Shoots arrows to enemies attacking you (or the ones you attack),
- When defeated, it will drop himself.
  
**Requires** [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)

![Plank Golem Attacking To A Sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6ef01bf5ea8e522fd25afa5e3cb10851871a795.png)
*It's in Beta, many things will change for inital release*
## Made w/MCreator
